chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-224 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For order on M.A No.1869/ 2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 28-10-2025. None present for the applicant. Mr. Dhani Bakhsh Mari, Assistant P.G a/w ASI PS Sarhari. = ASI P.S Sarhari furnished report of S.H.O regarding service of notice upon respondents, which is taken on record. After service of notice, respondent No.2 Saddam Hussain appeared. This is date by court matter and absence of the applicant and his counsel reflects that they have lost their interest to pursue instant matter, therefore, this Criminal Miscellaneous application alongwith listed application stands dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE *Saleem*
